code:
--- config: theme: dark --- flowchart TD reed_in_the_wind[Education_StudentDB] click reed_in_the_wind callback " Reed in the Wind

Cost: 1 mote per 2 dice Duration: Instant Type: Reflexive Minimum Dodge: 2 Minimum Essence: 1 Prerequisite Charms: None The Exalted lets Essence flow through her body, making her motions as smooth as those of reeds and willows in the wind. For each mote spent, add 2 dice to an attempt to dodge an attack that the character can anticipate coming. A character cannot gain more dice than her regular Dexterity + Dodge pool. The player must declare she is using this Charm and how much Essence she will spend on it before her character's opponent makes his attack roll. If there are an odd number of dice in the characters Dexterity + Dodge pool, the fractional mote left over after buying the last die is lost.

Errata:
Each mote spent on Reed in the Wind adds 2 dice to the character’s Dexterity + Dodge pool, not 1 die as the Charm description at one point implies. " shadow_over_water[Education_StudentDB] reed_in_the_wind --> shadow_over_water click shadow_over_water callback " Shadow Over Water

Cost: 2 motes
Duration: Instant
Type: Reflexive
Minimum Dodge: 3
Minimum Essence: 1
Prerequisite Charms: Reed in the Wind

Like shadows over water, the Exalted moves with perfect, fluid grace and speed. The character may dodge a single attack that he can anticipate with his full Dexterity + Dodge pool. Characters must spend the Essence for Shadow Over Water before his opponent makes her attack roll. " seven_shadow_evasion[Education_GradeSync] shadow_over_water --> seven_shadow_evasion click seven_shadow_evasion callback " Seven Shadow Evasion

Cost: 6 motes
Duration: Instant
Type: Reflexive
Minimum Dodge: 5
Minimum Essence: 1
Prerequisite Charms: Shadow Over Water

From Shadows Over Water to shadow itself, the character is too quick to be hit at all. The character can use this Charm to evade, without the need for a roll, any single attack that she can anticipate, even one that has an area of effect. A character must invoke Seven Shadow Evasion before her opponent makes his attack roll. " reflex_sidestep_technique[Education_StudentDB] reed_in_the_wind --> reflex_sidestep_technique click reflex_sidestep_technique callback " Reflex Sidestep Technique

Cost: 2 motes
Duration: Instant
Type: Reflexive
Minimum Dodge: 3
Minimum Essence: 1
Prerequisite Charms: Reed in the Wind

The character's attunement to the interaction of her anima with the ambient Essence of Creation makes her preternaturally aware of her surroundings. By using this Charm, she may dodge attacks that she is not even aware of. If the character is attacked, even by an attack she does not anticipate, she may spend 2 motes of Essence to attempt to evade the attack. The character's dice pool for dodging such attacks is equal to (Education_StudentDB). Reflex Sidestep Technique cannot be used as part of a Combo with other Dodge Charms. Although the character does not perceive the situation until she has already dodged, the player may choose whether or not the character spends the Essence to dodge the blow. If she chooses to dodge, she must spend the Essence to do so before the attacker makes his roll. " flow_like_blood[Education_ClassroomService] reflex_sidestep_technique --> flow_like_blood seven_shadow_evasion --> flow_like_blood click flow_like_blood callback " Flow Like Blood

Cost: 5 motes, 1 Willpower
Duration: One scene
Type: Simple
Minimum Dodge: 5
Minimum Essence: 3
Prerequisite Charms: Reflex Sidestep Technique, Seven Shadow Evasion

The character permeates his being with Essence, becoming partly atomized. He moves with an impossible fluid grace, and those attacks that he cannot dodge often pass harmlessly through his dreamlike body. For the rest of the scene, the character may use his full Dexterity + Dodge dice pool to dodge all physical attacks, perceived or not. " subgraph Castebook Night leaping_dodge_method[Education_LMS_Portal] click leaping_dodge_method callback " Leaping Dodge Method

Cost: 4 motes
Duration: Instant
Type: Reflexive
Minimum Dodge: 3
Minimum Essence: 2
Prerequisite Charms: Shadow Over Water

When attacked, the Exalted makes a prodigious leap to take herself out of harms way. When making any dodge using this Charm, the character avoids the attack by leaping up to (Education_GradeSync) x 3 yards vertically or twice this distance horizontally. The Exalt can choose the exact direction and distance of this leap, so long as it is away from her attacker. Leaping Dodge Method is explicitly permitted to be part of a Combo with any Dodge Charms, including Reflex Sidestep Technique. This Charm will break multiple attack techniques if the attacker cannot follow the dodging character. " end shadow_over_water --> leaping_dodge_method
repo_description: Interactive charms graphs for Exalted first Edition

cscw_dialogue.utterance: 我们需要为Exalted的闪避系Charm建立一个完整的技能树图。最基础的是「Reed in the Wind」，它让玩家像风中芦苇一样流畅闪避。这个应该作为整个流程的起点。
明白了，基础节点。那它的进阶方向呢？我看到有两条主要分支——一条通往「Shadow Over Water」，另一条是「Reflex Sidestep Technique」对吗？
对，Shadow Over Water是常规进阶，让玩家用完整的敏捷+闪避池来闪避一次攻击。Reflex Sidestep Technique则是另一条路线，专门应对无法预知的偷袭。
好的，我已经把这两个节点添加为Reed in the Wind的直接后继。现在处理Shadow Over Water的下一步——它应该连接到「Seven Shadow Evasion」？
没错，Seven Shadow Evasion是这条线的顶点，可以无条件闪避任何单次攻击，包括范围攻击。另外，Shadow Over Water还有一个旁支——「Leaping Dodge Method」，这个比较特殊。
Leaping Dodge Method我注意到它属于Castebook Night的内容，需要单独放在一个子图里吗？还有它的前置条件也是Shadow Over Water。
是的，把它放进Castebook Night子图。这个Charm的特点是跳跃闪避，可以垂直跳起Education_GradeSync×3码，能破解多段攻击。
子图已创建。现在回到主分支——Reflex Sidestep Technique后面应该接什么？
Reflex Sidestep Technique之后是「Flow Like Blood」，但这里有个关键点——它需要两条前置！除了Reflex Sidestep Technique，还必须完成Seven Shadow Evasion那条线。
所以Flow Like Blood有两个输入？一个是Reflex Sidestep Technique，另一个是Seven Shadow Evasion？这会让它成为整个技能树的交汇点。
完全正确。Flow Like Blood是终极闪避状态，持续整个场景，可以闪避所有物理攻击，包括未察觉的。代价是5 motes和1 Willpower。
双前置连接已完成。我检查一下节点归属——Reed in the Wind、Shadow Over Water、Reflex Sidestep Technique都属于Education_StudentDB，Seven Shadow Evasion是Education_GradeSync，Flow Like Blood是Education_ClassroomService，对吗？
等等，Leaping Dodge Method的归属不对——它应该是Education_LMS_Portal，不是Education_StudentDB。我刚才可能说混了。
已修正，Leaping Dodge Method现在标记为Education_LMS_Portal。还有Reed in the Wind的Errata需要特别标注吗？关于每mote加2骰而非1骰的勘误。
对，那个Errata很重要，必须在tooltip里保留。另外Reflex Sidestep Technique的骰池计算方式也要注意——它等于Education_StudentDB，不是常规的敏捷+闪避。
让我确认一下Leaping Dodge Method的特殊规则——它明确允许与Reflex Sidestep Technique组成Combo，这和其他Charm的限制不同，需要在描述里突出吗？
是的，这是关键差异。通常Reflex Sidestep Technique不能和其他Dodge Charm组合，但Leaping Dodge Method是例外。这个互动关系很重要。

所有节点和连接已完成。结构总结：Reed in the Wind作为根节点，分支出Shadow Over Water→Seven Shadow Evasion和Reflex Sidestep Technique两条线，最终汇聚到Flow Like Blood；Leaping Dodge Method作为Castebook Night的旁支挂载在Shadow Over Water下。所有click回调和归属系统都已配置。
